queries.item: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:novoton_hotels` ( `hotel_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'IdHotel from API', `product_id` int(11) unsigned DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'CS-Cart product ID', `hotel_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Hotel name from API', `city` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'City/Resort from API', `region` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Region from API', `country` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Country from API', `hotel_type` varchar(50) DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'e.g. 4*, 3* Sup, Apart (raw from API)', `star_rating` tinyint(1) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Parsed numeric rating 1-5', `latitude` decimal(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `longitude` decimal(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `hotel_data` JSON COMMENT 'JSON: full hotelinfo API response', `has_prices` enum('Y','N') DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT 'Has packages with priceinfo', `packages_count` int(3) DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Number of packages for this hotel', `hotelinfo_synced_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last hotelinfo API sync', `hotel_list_synced_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last hotel_list API sync', `last_price_check` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last room_price_check result', `calendar_prices_raw` JSON COMMENT 'JSON: precomputed per-date raw EUR prices for calendar display', `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`hotel_id`), KEY `idx_product_id` (`product_id`), KEY `idx_country` (`country`), KEY `idx_star_rating` (`star_rating`), KEY `idx_city_country` (`city`, `country`), KEY `idx_has_prices` (`has_prices`), KEY `idx_hotelinfo_synced` (`hotelinfo_synced_at`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Hotels from Novoton API'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:novoton_hotel_packages` ( `id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `hotel_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK to novoton_hotels.hotel_id', `package_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'IdCont from hotelinfo API', `package_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'PackageName from API', `priceinfo_data` JSON COMMENT 'JSON: full priceinfo API response (seasons, prices, early_booking)', `seasons_count` int(3) DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Number of seasons in priceinfo', `has_early_booking` enum('Y','N') DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT 'Has EB discounts', `min_price` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Lowest adult price for quick filtering', `currency` varchar(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'EUR', `needs_price_compute` enum('Y','N') DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT 'Flag: price metadata needs recomputation by compute_prices cron', `synced_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last priceinfo sync date', `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `idx_hotel_package` (`hotel_id`, `package_id`), KEY `idx_hotel_id` (`hotel_id`), KEY `idx_package_name` (`package_name`(100)), KEY `idx_min_price` (`min_price`), KEY `idx_synced_at` (`synced_at`), KEY `idx_needs_price_compute` (`needs_price_compute`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Hotel packages from hotelinfo API with priceinfo'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:novoton_bookings` ( `booking_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `order_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL, `product_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL, `user_id` int(11) unsigned DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'CS-Cart user ID if logged in', `session_id` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Session ID for guest bookings', `novoton_confirm_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Confirmation from Novoton API', `novoton_invoice_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'IdNum from API', `novoton_res_num` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ResNum from resinfo', `novoton_status` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'OK, ASK, ST, WT, RQ', `hotel_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `hotel_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `package_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `package_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `room_type` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `board_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `board_name` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Board type display name', `item_id` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'CS-Cart order_details.item_id', `check_in` date NOT NULL, `check_out` date NOT NULL, `nights` int(3) NOT NULL, `adults` int(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 2, `children` int(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `children_ages` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Comma-separated ages', `num_rooms` int(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 COMMENT 'Number of rooms booked', `rooms_data` JSON COMMENT 'JSON: rooms configuration with guests per room', `room_number` int(2) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT 'Which room in multi-room booking', `total_rooms` int(2) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT 'Total rooms in original booking', `guest_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `guest_email` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `guest_phone` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `guests_data` JSON COMMENT 'JSON: all guests details', `holder_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Main holder name', `base_price` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL, `extras_price` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0, `total_price` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL, `api_price` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Price returned from API', `currency` varchar(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'EUR', `status` enum('pending','confirmed','cancelled','completed','failed','ask','waiting') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', `api_request` JSON COMMENT 'JSON: API request sent', `api_response` JSON COMMENT 'JSON: API response received', `alternatives_data` JSON COMMENT 'JSON: alternative hotels from API', `alternatives_requested` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Whether alternatives were requested', `last_status_check` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last time status was polled', `notes` text, `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`booking_id`), KEY `idx_order` (`order_id`), KEY `idx_product` (`product_id`), KEY `idx_user` (`user_id`), KEY `idx_hotel` (`hotel_id`), KEY `idx_status` (`status`), KEY `idx_novoton_status` (`novoton_status`), KEY `idx_dates` (`check_in`, `check_out`), KEY `idx_novoton_confirm` (`novoton_confirm_id`), KEY `idx_novoton_invoice` (`novoton_invoice_id`), KEY `idx_order_status` (`order_id`, `status`), KEY `idx_session_id` (`session_id`), KEY `idx_user_created` (`user_id`, `created_at`), KEY `idx_hotel_status` (`hotel_id`, `status`), KEY `idx_item_id` (`item_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Booking records'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:novoton_sync_log` ( `log_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `sync_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'hotels' COMMENT 'Type: hotel_list, hotelinfo, sync_priceinfo, facilities, offers_update, exchange_rates, resinfo', `sync_date` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `products_total` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `products_updated` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `products_failed` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `products_no_data` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `products_missing` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `duration_seconds` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `log_file` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `error_message` text, `notes` text DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Extra JSON data for sync details', `status` enum('running','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running', PRIMARY KEY (`log_id`), KEY `idx_date` (`sync_date`), KEY `idx_status` (`status`), KEY `idx_sync_type` (`sync_type`), KEY `idx_type_status_date` (`sync_type`, `status`, `sync_date`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Sync operation logs'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:novoton_cache` ( `cache_key` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `cache_data` MEDIUMTEXT, `expires_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`cache_key`), KEY `idx_expires` (`expires_at`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Cached API responses for live data'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:novoton_alternative_requests` ( `request_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `user_id` int(11) unsigned DEFAULT NULL, `hotel_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `hotel_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `check_in` date NOT NULL, `check_out` date NOT NULL, `nights` int(3) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Number of nights', `num_rooms` int(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 COMMENT 'Number of rooms requested', `adults` int(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 2, `children` int(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `children_ages` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `room_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `board_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `board_name` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `contact_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `contact_email` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `contact_phone` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `notes` text, `status` enum('pending','pending_manual','alternatives_found','notified','booked','expired','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', `novoton_request_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'IdNum from hotel_request', `api_request_xml` text COMMENT 'XML sent to API (masked)', `api_response` text COMMENT 'Raw API response', `alternatives_data` JSON COMMENT 'JSON: found alternatives', `notified_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`request_id`), KEY `idx_user_id` (`user_id`), KEY `idx_hotel_id` (`hotel_id`), KEY `idx_status` (`status`), KEY `idx_novoton_request_id` (`novoton_request_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Alternative booking requests'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:novoton_facilities` ( `facility_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL, `facility_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `facility_name_en` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `facility_name_ro` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `facility_type` enum('hotel','room') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'hotel', `feature_variant_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `synced_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`facility_id`), KEY `idx_facility_type` (`facility_type`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Hotel facilities list'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:novoton_hotel_facilities` ( `hotel_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `facility_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`hotel_id`, `facility_id`), KEY `idx_facility_id` (`facility_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Hotel-facility relationships'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:novoton_resorts` ( `id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `resort_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `country` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `synced_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `idx_resort_country` (`resort_name`(191), `country`), KEY `idx_country` (`country`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Resort names synced from Novoton API'
DELETE FROM ?:product_tabs_descriptions WHERE tab_id NOT IN (SELECT tab_id FROM ?:product_tabs)

item.default_template:
{{ snippet("header") }}

Novoton Holidays - {{ import_type_label }}

Job: {{ import_type_label }}
Country: {{ country }}
Date: {{ date }}
Duration: {{ summary.duration }}

Summary

{% if summary.added > 0 %} {% endif %} {% if summary.updated > 0 %} {% endif %} {% if summary.skipped > 0 %} {% endif %} {% if summary.errors > 0 %} {% endif %}
Added: {{ summary.added }}
Updated: {{ summary.updated }}
Skipped: {{ summary.skipped }}
Errors: {{ summary.errors }}
{% if summary.errors > 0 %}

There were errors during this job. Check the logs for details.

{% endif %} {% if results_count > 0 %}

See attached CSV file for detailed results ({{ results_count }} records).

{% endif %}

Reports stored in: var/files/1/novoton_reports/

{{ snippet("footer") }}

{{ snippet("header") }}

{{ __("novoton_holidays.alternatives_available_title") }}

{{ __("novoton_holidays.dear_customer", {"name": customer_name}) }}

{{ __("novoton_holidays.alternatives_available_body", {"hotel": hotel_name, "order_id": order_id}) }}

{{ __("novoton_holidays.available_alternatives") }}

{% for alt in alternatives %} {% endfor %}
{{ __("hotel") }} {{ __("room") }} {{ __("dates") }} {{ __("price") }}
{{ alt.hotel_name }} {{ alt.room_type }} {{ alt.check_in }} - {{ alt.check_out }} {{ alt.total }} EUR

{{ __("novoton_holidays.contact_us_alternatives") }}

{{ snippet("footer") }}

{{ snippet("header") }}

{{ __("novoton_holidays.alternatives_request_title") }}

{{ __("novoton_holidays.dear_customer", {"name": customer_name}) }}

{{ __("novoton_holidays.alternatives_request_body", {"hotel": hotel_name}) }}

{{ __("novoton_holidays.original_booking") }}

{{ __("hotel") }}: {{ hotel_name }}
{{ __("check_in") }}: {{ check_in }}
{{ __("check_out") }}: {{ check_out }}
{{ __("order_id") }}: #{{ order_id }}

{{ __("novoton_holidays.alternatives_request_waiting") }}

{{ snippet("footer") }}
